diagrams.title: Computing Evolution Timeline
diagrams.description: Shows the progression of computing paradigms from 1950s to present
diagrams.purpose: Understand historical progression and key transitions in computing paradigms

diagrams.title: Cloud Service Model Pyramid
diagrams.description: Hierarchy showing IaaS, PaaS, SaaS with decreasing user control
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the level of abstraction and user responsibility in each service model

diagrams.title: Virtualization vs Containerization Architecture
diagrams.description: Comparison of how VMs and containers share hardware resources
diagrams.purpose: Understand the fundamental difference in resource isolation approaches

diagrams.title: Cloud Deployment Models
diagrams.description: Visual representation of Public, Private, Hybrid, and Community clouds
elements: Hybrid Cloud - Connected public and private
diagrams.purpose: Differentiate between deployment options based on resource sharing and ownership
